title: Toggle Scoreboard
description: A simple mod that adds a keybind to toggle the scoreboard!
body:
# Toggle Scoreboard - ![Toggle Scoreboard Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/toggle-scoreboard)

This is a simple mod that adds a keybind to toggle the side scoreboard.

Go to `Options` => `Controls` => `Key Binds` and locate the `Toggle Scoreboard` category to set a key bind.

For NeoForge this will be merged into the Misc category.

Once set you should be able to simply use the new keybind to toggle the scoreboard on/off.
